title: skulon #4661
definition:
1) a (beast's) skin stripped off, a pelt
 2) the weapons and valuables stripped off from an enemy, spoils
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) a (beast's) skin stripped off, a pelt
 2) the weapons and valuables stripped off from an enemy, spoils

    NASB:  arms stripped from a foe, i.e. spoils:
